name: Content Creation Pipeline
description: End-to-end content creation: research, outline, draft, review, and finalize

steps.name: topic-research
steps.prompt_template:
Conduct comprehensive research on this topic. Find key facts, statistics, expert opinions, and latest developments:

Topic: {{input}}

steps.name: create-outline
steps.prompt_template:
Create a detailed outline for an article based on this research:

{{research}}

steps.name: write-draft
content-review
steps.prompt_template:
Review this draft for clarity, flow, grammar, and engagement. Identify areas for improvement:

{{draft}}

steps.name: needs-revision-check
steps.prompt_template:
Analyze this review and respond with 'NEEDS_REVISION' if significant improvements are recommended, otherwise 'OK':

{{review}}

steps.name: revise-content
finalize
steps.prompt_template:
Finalize the content. If revised, use the revised version; otherwise use the draft. Format it nicely with proper headings and structure:

{{#if steps.revise-content.output}}{{steps.revise-content.output}}{{else}}{{steps.write-draft.output}}{{/if}}
